characters.name: James
characters.description: Senior consultant, refined received pronunciation. Used for formal briefings and executive contexts.

characters.name: Oliver
characters.description: Account manager, modern London accent. Used for day-to-day business talk and casual meetings.

characters.name: Harry
characters.description: Analyst, clear neutral British. Used for reports, data and process explanations. (Shares base voice with Oliver — msedge-tts limitation; replace with ElevenLabs for a fully distinct voice.)

characters.name: Sophie
characters.description: HR director, poised RP delivery. Used for strategic HR topics and leadership scenarios.

characters.name: Emily
characters.description: Team lead, warm London accent. Used for employee engagement and culture conversations.

characters.name: Charlotte
characters.description: Finance partner, articulate neutral British. Used for compliance, numbers and formal advice.
